summary:
DIVINE CURE FOR CANCER: Brandon shares a vision in which God reveals an upcoming, permanent cure for cancer. Brandon describes seeing a non-Christian scientist in a lab coat receiving a sudden divine revelation to create this cure. According to Brandon, the remedy will be a simple, earth-based supplement acting as both a preventative measure and an instantaneous cure for all types of cancer. Brandon states that while government entities will attempt to suppress this discovery, divine intervention will ensure its release. Brandon mentions knowing the specific company involved but chooses to withhold the name to protect it from spiritual attacks, noting a pattern where he is instructed to pray for health and wellness companies even before their inception.

BLACK SWAN EVENTS AND ENERGY CRISIS: Brandon warns of impending Black Swan events orchestrated by the Deep State as distractions. Brandon details a specific vision regarding the energy sector, asserting that due to declining public interest in electric vehicles caused by range anxiety, manipulated events will artificially inflate gasoline prices. Brandon predicts a return to 1970s-style gas lines, engineered to discourage fossil fuel use and force the population into adopting electric vehicles.

DIVINE JUDGMENT AND ACCELERATED HARVEST: Brandon discusses an impending judgment on individuals pushing dark agendas, specifically mentioning an elderly man in a high position who will face sudden, overnight consequences. Brandon outlines a concept of accelerated seedtime and harvest, where both righteous and wicked actions will yield immediate results. Brandon states that those contributing to positive deeds, such as tithes and charity, will see rapid supernatural increase, while those involved in illicit activities like trafficking and drugs will face swift divine retribution.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND END TIMES PREPARATION: Brandon recounts a story of an Australian man who experienced hell, using it to emphasize that time is running out before the return of Jesus and the Rapture. Brandon stresses the importance of repentance and spiritual deliverance, advising individuals to renew their minds by continuously reading scripture, citing Smith Wigglesworth's practice of reading the New Testament frequently. Brandon concludes by detailing specific healing declarations for physical ailments, fertility issues, and spiritual attacks, advising the use of anointing oil to expel minor demonic entities responsible for nightmares and sleep disturbances.
rawData: [July 13, 2024]-[The Lord told me the cure for cancer is coming]-[https://youtu.be/CJx5E0JFv2M]-[Good morning, family. I'm excited to be with you all again today. I have a word. You know, I usually come on here and have a lot of negative words—what people would call doom and gloom. But today, I have the opportunity to give you a positive word, an uplifting word, an encouraging word that people have been believing for decades and decades, maybe thousands of years. You know, cancer has been around for a long, long time. The Lord spoke to me whenever I was praying, and He opened my eyes in the realm of the spirit. He said, "Brandon, I'm bringing the cure for cancer." I saw a man in a lab coat, and he was pouring some stuff in a jar. All of a sudden, Holy Ghost revelation came to his mind, and he saw it—whatever it was, I don't know, I'm not a chemist. He put it together, then he looked at it underneath the microscope and found it by the Holy Spirit. The Lord spoke to me and said this man is not even a born-again Christian. He warned me and said, "Brandon, I'm bringing this to pass because people have cried out to Me for a long time. They have been believing for their relatives and people that have gone home too early." This has been a plague on humanity, and the Lord said, "Brandon, I'm bringing a cure for this." He said, "I'm going to put My foot on this, and it will become like plagues of the past that were completely eradicated, things we don't hear about anymore, like leprosy or tuberculosis—things that were very deadly in the early 1800s before they came out with the vaccinations." Some of those viruses back then were very serious, but now, with antibiotics, it's able to be taken care of a lot easier. The Lord told me this will be a preventative and a cure at the same time. He said people can take this and will never even have it in their body, and the people that have it will automatically be healed; it will just leave them. The way He presented it to me was that it didn't matter what kind of cancer it was, it would be gone. It wouldn't be a long, drawn-out process; it would just instantaneously start to turn the ship around. The Lord said to me it would not be a medication; it would be like a supplement. That's how simple He said it is. He said, "Son, it's something so simple coming from the earth." Whenever they put these things together, it will create the combination that it takes for the cure. It's designed perfectly for it, but it's divine from God. Does that make sense? I'm doing the best I can with this, but what I saw in the spirit was the Lord telling me that cancer would become a thing of the past. There would be government things that would rise up to try to stop it, but the Lord would put His hand on it to stop them because He said this has been something that has been dealt with for too long. I was so filled with the Holy Spirit whenever He gave me this word. I couldn't wait to come on here and tell you what the Lord is telling me is coming for the world. It's because God so loved the world that He gave His one and only begotten son, that whosoever believes in Him should not perish but have everlasting life. He gave salvation to everybody. That's the way God is—He's not just about Christians; He's about loving everybody. He wants everybody to come to repentance so they don't have to go to hell. Bottom line, folks. He's not up there with a big stick hitting people in the head. He wants to show you His love and His kindness. He gave His son, who died for us and rose again on the third day, and He is seated right now at the right hand of the Father. I'm telling you, He's coming back again, but He has a present for all of us. Jesus took all those things on the cross for us; we don't have to have it now. But some people don't have the faith to believe for healing, or the cure for cancer, or diabetes. Jesus paid the price for everybody to have health and healing. Sometimes He uses medicine to help folks that don't know how to believe by faith, and that's just the mercy of God. What I'm trying to tell you is that He told me He is giving a supernatural wisdom to this man that was mixing stuff. I saw the company name and where it was located. I'm praying over it still; you can pray with me. I'm not going to give that out yet because I don't want any demonic attacks trying to come against this. I believe God is going to do what He said He would do. The company does exist. They are working with supplements right now, but I don't even know if they know about it yet. I see things in part and hear in part, sometimes years in advance. There have been times whenever He has told me to pray for companies that didn't even exist yet. He'll give me a name and spell it out in a vision. I'll try to Google it, and it doesn't exist yet, but He says, "I want you to intercede for this name." So I pray over the name for months or years. All of a sudden, He'll say, "Brandon, that company has been birthed and it is existing now. I want you to go Google it," and it's there. I'll look at their mission, and it's usually for health and wellness. Then I see other companies try to attack with lawsuits because the devil doesn't want people to be restored. His mission is to kill, steal, and destroy, but the Lord said, "I have come that you might have life and life more abundantly." He wants us to live in the overflow of life with joy unspeakable and full of glory. There are dark days and hard times because we're in the last of the last seconds before Jesus Christ comes back, but I'm telling you, folks, there is an anointing on healing, deliverance, growing out limbs, and creative miracles that we have not even yet seen. Good days are coming; blessed days are coming. Another thing the Lord showed me: there's going to be Black Swan events coming—distractions from the Deep State—that we'll have to pray against. The enemy is trying to distract and cause things not to happen that God wants to happen. But we all know the devil's defeated and we have authority over him. I told you all about EVs and the green agenda being pushed. I saw an article stating that people were losing interest in EVs because of range anxiety. The Holy Ghost warned me that events are going to come to try to discourage people from gasoline and sway them toward EVs because of gas prices going up again. I saw gas prices going high and lines for gasoline, like in the 1970s. The Lord warned me about lines for gasoline because they couldn't get the gas into the stations. These things are trying to manifest again. Just letting you know, this is something to be on alert about. These men's agendas are going to fall. They think they're gods, but I'm telling you, Dad is about ready to spank some rears. I saw a man that I pray about a lot who is over a lot of dark agenda. The Lord warned me, "Brandon, I'm going to deal with that, and it's going to be something that happens overnight." I looked up the man's age; he's in his elderly years. He's going to go home soon. Judgment is coming. I saw him being dealt with, and it was very concerning to me because I know this man is not born again. There are going to be people in high positions that God is going to start to deal with, and they'll be here one minute and gone the next. The Lord warned me that there's an acceleration of seed time and harvest. People walking in darkness and evil will reap what they sow. There's going to be an acceleration of good and an acceleration of bad. When we see these people who have been sowing bad, they're going to sow and reap what they've sown. But when you've sown good things—your tithes, your offerings, your time, taking care of the widow and the orphan—you're going to start reaping an amazing harvest. Supernatural increase is coming to your house. You're going to start to see the manifestation of what you sowed within a couple of hours because seed time and harvest is accelerating. We're also going to see the darkness start to reap what they've sown: perversion, sex trafficking, drugs, and prostitution. God said, "I'm bringing judgment on this stuff." You see these people practicing evil and think they're getting away with it? They're not. Payday is coming, and it's going to be a bad payday for these people. If you're one of them, you better turn before you burn. It's time for you to repent and ask the Lord Jesus Christ to forgive you. If you confess your sins, He is faithful and just to forgive you. Your time is running out. I had an email from a man in Australia who was raised in an abusive Christian home. He died and went to hell, and he saw all the things in hell. He was tormented beyond comprehension. Hell is real, and so is heaven. Out of His mercy, the Lord brought this man back, and he is now born-again and spirit-filled. But time is running out. As in the days of Noah, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. The door of the Ark is getting ready to close. There are people who mock me and call me a false prophet, but I don't care. I'm going to keep telling you: Jesus is coming. They mocked Noah until that first drop hit their forehead. The time is coming when the Rapture occurs and we're changed in the twinkling of an eye. You can turn your life around right now. Run from sin, run from the devil. Some people feel like they have a devil and need deliverance. You should know the truth, and the truth will set you free. Find scriptures about being free—that "the wicked one touches you not." Feed your spirit. The more you get in the Word and renew your mind, the more you will be set free. Smith Wigglesworth used to carry a New Testament in his pocket and read it every 15 minutes. That's how you do it. You've got to fill yourself up because we leak. This is what's going to set you free from demonic spirits. If you don't fill yourself up with the Word, they're going to come back with eight more of their friends. Stay free, renew your mind, and take communion daily. Father, I thank You for every person watching. I thank You, Lord, that they are healed and whole. They are delivered from cancer, diabetes, and heart disease. You put it on my heart this morning to pray for people believing for babies. I thank You, Lord, that in 2024, they will have that child. If You did it for Abraham and Sarah, You will do it for them. We speak to the seed of the man and call it fertile. I speak to women's ovaries and their Fallopian tubes. Their vines will not cast fruit before the time. I see someone about to have a baby boy. I thank You, Lord, for new kidneys, new hearts, new discs, and new tendons. We curse infection in prostates and command it to go in the name of Jesus. We thank You for deliverance from demonic spirits. I take authority over bipolar disorder and PTSD. I call healing over their minds. I saw someone being tormented in their sleep with recurring nightmares. You are delivered from that in the name of Jesus. I hear the Spirit of the Lord say, "Anoint your bed and your home with oil." This is a demonic spirit sent to torment you. Anoint your forehead before you go to bed and put a bloodline over your mind. He gives His beloved sweet sleep. This is just a little imp devil; it's not a principality. It looks like a little monkey in the spirit realm. Get it out of here. Those days are done. I plead the blood over you. Jesus loves you. No more torment of PTSD. Anoint your mind with oil too. Jesus knows your heart. Surely goodness and mercy will follow you all the days of your life. I call everyone healed, whole, and delivered. Amen. If you could, please click the notification bell, like, and subscribe. You're helping to get the gospel out and get people saved around the world. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you. Bye-bye.]
